questionHtml:
What is the minimum number of nucleotides needed to code for a polypeptide composed of 210 amino acids?

A. 70

B. 210

C. 420

D. 630

meta.title: What is the minimum number of nucleotides needed to code for a polypeptide composed of 210 amino acids? A. 70 B. 210 C. 420 D. 630
